lobby.title: Welcome to the
lobby.description: A space where code becomes art, and ideas transform into digital experiences. Explore the fragments of a developer's consciousness.

experiments.title: The
experiments.description: Where imagination meets implementation. Interactive experiments that push the boundaries of what's possible in the browser.

items.title: Liquid Morphism
items.description: Fluid interfaces that respond to your presence

items.title: Neural Patterns
items.description: AI-driven visual systems that learn and adapt

items.title: Quantum States
items.description: Components existing in multiple states simultaneously

bug.title: The Bug
bug.descBroken: Reality has been corrupted. Bugs have invaded the system.
bug.descFixing: Applying patches and restoring system integrity...
bug.descFixed: Order has been restored. All systems operational.
bug.bugsEliminated: All bugs have been eliminated from this dimension.

ideas.title: The
ideas.description: A creative laboratory where concepts take shape. Click on any idea to explore its holographic wireframe and potential.

items.title: Neural Dashboard
items.description: AI-powered analytics that predict user behavior

items.title: Quantum Forms
items.description: Form validation that exists in superposition until observed

items.title: Emotion Engine
items.description: Interfaces that adapt to user emotional states

timeline.title: Through the
timeline.description: A journey through the evolution of a developer. Each memory a stepping stone to greater understanding.

events.title: The Beginning
events.description: First lines of code. The journey into the digital realm begins.

events.title: Full Stack Awakening
events.description: Backend meets frontend. The full picture emerges.

events.title: Design Systems
events.description: Building blocks of digital experiences. Consistency at scale.

events.title: AI Integration
events.description: Machines that think. Code that writes itself.

events.title: The Present
events.description: Building the future, one component at a time.

projects.title: Featured
projects.description: Each project is a portal to another dimension. Hover to explore, click to enter.
projects.moreText: More artifacts are being forged in the digital void...

items.title: Mars Commerce
items.subtitle: Interplanetary E-Commerce
items.description: A futuristic e-commerce platform designed for the Martian colonization era. Features cosmic product catalogs, space-themed UI, and seamless shopping experience.

items.title: Hamster Kombat
items.subtitle: Tap-to-Earn Game Clone
items.description: A pixel-perfect recreation of the viral Telegram game. Features tap mechanics, upgrade systems, and engaging gameplay animations.

items.title: Hacker Portfolio
items.subtitle: Cyberpunk Developer Site
items.description: A neon-drenched, cyberpunk-inspired portfolio that showcases the dark side of web development. Terminal aesthetics meet modern design.

items.title: Foodi Restaurant
items.subtitle: Premium Restaurant Landing
items.description: An appetizing landing page for a modern restaurant. Features stunning food photography layouts, menu showcases, and reservation systems.

items.title: YouTube Clone
items.subtitle: Video Streaming Platform
items.description: A comprehensive YouTube clone featuring video playback, search functionality, channel pages, and a familiar yet enhanced user interface.

finale.description: Every line of code is a thought, every component a memory, every animation a feeling. This is the digital consciousness of a frontend developer.
finale.builtWith: Built with ❤️ and countless cups of coffee
